============================================
  HUONG DAN CAI DAT PRINT SERVER
============================================

1. Chep file "serviceAccountKey.json" vao thu muc nay
   (cung cap tu Firebase Console > Service Account)

2. Chinh sua file ".env" de cau hinh:
   - MA_CUA_HANG: Ma cua hang (de trong neu muon chon khi chay)
   - INTERACTIVE_STORE_SELECT=true: Chon cua hang tren man hinh
   - PRINTER_NAME: Ten may in (de trong = may in mac dinh)
   - PAPER_SIZE_MM: Kho giay (mac dinh: 80mm)

3. Nhan doi chuot vao "start.bat" de chay

LUU Y:
   - Khong can cai dat Node.js - da co san trong thu muc "node\"
   - Khong can cai bat ky phan mem nao khac
   - May tinh can co ket noi Internet de ket noi Firebase
